blocks.text: Barça vs Atlético Could Settle the La Liga Title Race

Saturday peaks at 21:00 with Barcelona (73pts) hosting Atlético at the Metropolitano — a four-point gap means this could be a knockout blow. But first, Ventura and Reitan are hunting leaderboard places in San Antonio.
⛳ Valero Texas Open — Ventura & Reitan chase the leaders; MacIntyre leads the Norwegians at -6 behind Hubbard
🚴 Tour of Flanders — seven Norwegians including Wærenskjold race cycling's greatest cobbled Monument
